final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a minimalist Scandinavian interior living room scene, clean and warmly lit.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior editorial photography, Scandinavian minimalist aesthetic in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine
Composition: wide-angle shot from a slightly elevated eye-level perspective, capturing the full room with natural symmetry and generous negative space
Subject: grey fabric sofa as the focal piece, flanked by a potted green plant and a standing floor lamp, all arranged with deliberate restraint
Scene/backdrop: white walls, light natural wood-tone flooring, floor-to-ceiling window allowing abundant daylight to stream in
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight pouring through large windows, warm and diffused, casting gentle shadows — bright, clean, and inviting
Color palette: white as the dominant base, light wood as warm secondary, grey as the sofa anchor, muted green as the single accent
Materials/textures: linen-textured sofa fabric with subtle weave, smooth matte white walls, natural wood grain on floor planks
Avoid: dark moody tones, clutter, ornate decoration, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, staged showroom stiffness
